item.title: REPORT: Texas Democrat, Nicole Collier, being forcibly kept locked inside state house chamber for refusing to sign a "permission slip". Taking stand against gerrymandering.
item.description:
Sauce: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/08/19/rep-nicole-collier-texas-capitol/85722074007/ https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdd3gj5ve1go https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/politics-news/texas-democratic-legislator-stay-state-capitol-refusing-law-enforcemen-rcna225730
Doesn't this fit the definition of kidnapping or unlawful imprisonment or something?

item.title: Effectively kidnapped for not consenting to constant armed escort. This some bullscheisse.
item.description: Collier is being forced to sleep on the state house floor rather than be escorted out until she signs over to the governors wants... add intimidation and coercion to the list. Saw this further down in usersub and it was unfathomably downvoted out of the feed. Somethin' aint right there either.

item.title: Putin's 'proposal'
item.description: The red-shaded area is currently controlled by Russian orcs The black line is the area of Ukraine that Putin is demanding be ceded to Russia. Um....no. Russia needs to displace back into Russia, demilitarize 150km from the Ukrainian border; Ukraine joins the EU and NATO (for what that is worth with the US led by a Russian agent and child rapist); Russia pays for all damage to Ukraine and an indemnity for every Ukrainian killed. Furthermore, Russia surrenders all war criminals to The Hague for trial, to include Putin and Russian military leadership.

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #200
item.description: Foreign leaders flew into a militarily occupied Washington for a wartime summit, 3½ years into Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine. NATO and EU heads pressed Trump on Ukraine while DC streets sat under armed patrols, restaurants down by one-third, democracy suffocating at home. This is what authoritarian rule looks like. Stopping it is on us. Get local on Mobilize. The coordinated Workers over Billionaires event is on Sept 1. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/more-states-dc-troops 2. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-dems-police-surveillance 3. https://go.govbrief.today/johnson-vows-stop-california 4. https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-files-comer-friday 5. https://go.govbrief.today/multilateral-peace-summit-zelenskyy 6. https://go.govbrief.today/hud-documents-english-only 7. https://go.govbrief.today/finalize-hhs-layoffs 8. https://go.govbrief.today/air-force-chief-out 9. https://go.govbrief.today/chips-act-intel-stake 10. https://go.govbrief.today/bls-nominee-conspiracy-theories 11. https://go.govbrief.today/co-deputy-fbi-bailey 12. https://go.govbrief.today/newsmax-pays-election-lies 13. https://go.govbrief.today/maine-officer-self-deports 14. https://go.govbrief.today/internment-camp-ft-bliss 15. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-voting-mail-unconstitutional 16. https://go.govbrief.today/education-civil-rights-biased 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-denies-restaurant-downturn Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/oklahoma-teacher-loyalty-test Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/workers-over-billionaires-events Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Animorphs Was ALWAYS Trans
item.description: Don’t be a rat on an island, be a hawk in the sky, and share my massive deep dive into why “Animorphs Was ALWAYS Trans” - This was a ton of work so please share around for me! https://youtu.be/CFUEWIwW83A The Animorphs series has always been stranger, darker, and deeper than most young adult novels dared to be. And for so many of us, it reads as ridiculously trans-coded. In this video, I break down how Animorphs handled dysphoria, transformation, and the way society perceives you once you’ve changed. Whether you grew up with these books, or you’re discovering them now, there’s no denying how queer and trans these stories really are - wether intended or not. Check out the full video to see the full deep dive!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: My quest to secure my ability to vote
item.description: 19650/36500 https://gofundme.com/f/help-sam-gain-mobility-with-a-custom-wheelchair/fb/o?utm_medium=customer&utm_source=copy_link&utm_campaign=natman_sharesheet_dash&utm_content=&ts=1755645330608&attribution_id=sl:d8683df0-1574-4fcb-bafe-b759f0da804a Well, with Trump planning on removing mail-in ballots i need to get my wheelchair if I want to vote. Apparently active duty military doesn't deserve to vote either. He just keeps rigging the system for himself more and more, yet no one is doing anything about it. I fear for my country

item.title: Transgirl Tuesday the 31st
item.description:
Nicole Maines
Raquel Willis
Filip Vlasic
Janet Mock
Amaniana
Victoria Price
Bruna Tivo
Ella Hollywood
@Alsoashley, couldn’t resist her in this goth look. It’s been a while since I did one of these, and every day I feel like trans people need to be seen and heard more than ever. Join me in celebrating beauty and making transphobes uncomfortable. @MadSovereignMary @dickblack12 @Shenaniganz80 @MermaidNinja @secretlyacd @deaddogsmuggler @JohnWickdidnothingwrong @Ngugi @OldBikerDude @Kevinbfree @applesugar @DaymanAhAAAAah @bdennis3222000 @SassySailor @500ug @villainousdescent @AUserNameLikeNoOther @ShadowGod11 @SuperMermaidNinja2Turbo @Fishy820 @tron11DireTide @LoPan Lemme know if you’d like to be tagged as well. All the best, and all my love -JonnyH

item.description: it just might be YOU that is a piece of shit, choom. I have $10 that says he hangs out on redpill alpha bro spaces, whining that no woman wants to come within 2 miles of him. Also, if someone has an American flag in their social media handle, 99 times out of 100 they are a MASSIVE POS. I yanked this from Steve Hofstetter's YT channel.

Icantanymore242

item.title: Painted the Creation of Adam on myself - MCroft07
item.description: Here's a timeline cleanse :) Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I paint them all live on twitch.tv/mcroft07 and post more videos on my other socials. It took 12 hours I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) In these videos, it's very difficult to paint at the same time as film because I do not want to smudge the makeup that I've worked on, which is why the brush doesn't always touch. I'm not looking at what I'm doing and in the past I've messed something up. If I don't at least act like I'm brushing, the video looks boring to me. When you're mean to me I block you. If you're disrespectful to me once, I will not tolerate you being disrespectful to me twice. I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I had Greggs for lunch I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Another trump dump
item.dc:creator: KatLuvr54
